raw:
ISSUES:
- [severity:warning] KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/PG/PG0303.jsp:1865 - localStorage 'KIIPS_AUTO_PRINT' is set to 'Y' on click but never cleared or reset when a regular preview button is clicked; this will cause all subsequent normal previews to automatically trigger the print dialog until the browser is closed or storage is cleared.
- [severity:info] KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/PG/PG0303.jsp:1865 - Use of localStorage for a transient UI flag may cause side effects across multiple browser tabs of the same application; sessionStorage is recommended for per-tab/per-action state.

VERDICT: needs-attention
SUMMARY: The "Print Preview" feature uses persistent localStorage to signal auto-printing without providing a reset mechanism for normal previews, leading to unintended behavior in subsequent user actions.

issues.text: KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/PG/PG0303.jsp:1865 - localStorage 'KIIPS_AUTO_PRINT' is set to 'Y' on click but never cleared or reset when a regular preview button is clicked; this will cause all subsequent normal previews to automatically trigger the print dialog until the browser is closed or storage is cleared.

KiiPS-UI/src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/jsp/kiips/PG/PG0303.jsp:1865 - Use of localStorage for a transient UI flag may cause side effects across multiple browser tabs of the same application; sessionStorage is recommended for per-tab/per-action state.

summary: The "Print Preview" feature uses persistent localStorage to signal auto-printing without providing a reset mechanism for normal previews, leading to unintended behavior in subsequent user actions.
